content: The original Reflexion agent framework for autonomous agents can borrow core principles from high school English writing workshop reflection pedagogy to improve modern LLM multi-perspective self-reflection mechanisms: just as students are taught to revise drafts by explicitly reflecting on inconsistencies between their intended meaning and what their written text actually communicates, LLMs can be guided to contrast inconsistent problem-solving drafts the same way teachers train students to spot gaps in their own work. This turns the technical Self-Contrast reflection approach into a structured, pedagogically grounded iterative refinement process.
